reviewScope: 2025 pasted generated script containing daily lunar rows, solar terms, and city longitude data
sourceClaim: Script header claims PMO / National Time Service Center compilation standard.

sourceControlDecision.reason: The attachment is a generated script, not the original PMO PDF/CSV/TXT source. It has no independent raw-source URL, no checksum trail, and contains day-ganzhi values that conflict with the registered PMO extraction.

conflictEvidence.decision: Do not use generated-script dayGanzhi values for authority promotion.
Do not use generated-script dayGanzhi values for authority promotion.

trustedPromotionPath.primarySource: PMO-CALENDAR-1900-2025 PDF registered in docs/权威资料源登记.md
trustedPromotionPath.dayGanzhiRequirement: Use PMO extraction plus independent anchor or explicitly documented single-source PMO approval.
trustedPromotionPath.solarTermRequirement: Use PMO extraction plus HKO major-term comparison; minor terms require additional source or documented single-source PMO approval.
